purpose: Saudi woman in modest hijab on vivid solid colored backdrop. Studio editorial.

tone_descriptor.description: Tone direction: contemplative, bold, warm, dignified, kinetic, etc.

prompt_template: Editorial fashion photography of Saudi woman in late twenties wearing modest {color_descriptor} hijab and matching long-sleeve loose-fitting abaya in {abaya_color}, seated or standing pose on minimal {backdrop_color} solid colored studio backdrop, soft directional studio light from upper left, real visible skin texture, modest framing with full coverage neck to ankles, contemplative or confident expression looking slightly off-camera, shot on 85mm at f/4, no text, no watermark {cultural_constraints_injection}
anti_patterns: Avoid in output: exposed hair under hijab
notes: Intents: launch, grow. Source code in research corpus: T33. Saudi adaptation guidance: Vivid colored backdrop signals modern editorial fashion rather than traditional. Default hijab styling contemporary Saudi. Reference image: Recommended. Recommended frequency: 2-3 per month. Compliance level: elevated.
